headline: CrowdStrike Named a Leader in the 2026 IDC MarketScape for Worldwide SIEM
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, June 23, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced it has been named a Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide SIEM 2026 Vendor Assessment.1 We believe this recognition reflects how CrowdStrike Falcon® Next-Gen SIEM is transforming security operations at global scale, as organizations replace legacy SIEMs to build the agentic SOC on the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform.

headline: Will The Stock Split Spark CrowdStrike’s Next Big Run?
summary: Cybersecurity provider CrowdStrike (CRWD) authorized its first-ever stock split at a 4-for-1 ratio, scheduled for distribution after the market close on July 1. A single share, trading near $680, drops to approximately $170 after the split. The split follows a sustained operational recovery from the global IT outage of July 2024. CrowdStrike shares bottomed at $217.89 on August 2, 2024, under severe regulatory scrutiny. Over the next 22 months, the stock rebounded by more than 210%. The comeback

headline: Airrived Ranked #1 in AWS Cybersecurity Startup Accelerator, Selected by AWS, CrowdStrike, CyberE71 and UAE Cyber Security Council
summary: DUBLIN, Calif., June 23, 2026--Airrived, creator of the Agentic OS for enterprise AI, today announced it was ranked #1 overall in the prestigious AWS/CTIB Cybersecurity Startup Accelerator, a global program backed by Amazon Web Services (AWS), CrowdStrike, CyberE71, and the UAE Cyber Security Council.
